case_title: BUILD (CA) QRS 12-24, INC. AND CONSTRUCT QRS 14-18 VS. THE SCOTT COMPANIES, INC.,AND SCOTT CO. OF CA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE SCOTT COMPANIES, INC.,AND SCOTT CO. OF CA

TO CONFIRM CONSTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER BUILD (CA) QRS 12-24, INC. AND CONSTRUCT QRS 14-18 , INC., HEARING SET FOR JUL-27-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER BUILD (CA) QRS 12-24, INC. AND CONSTRUCT QRS 14-18 , INC., SERVED JUN-30-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT THE SCOTT COMPANIES, INC.,AND SCOTT CO. OF CA

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER BUILD (CA) QRS 12-24, INC. AND CONSTRUCT QRS 14-18 TO CONFIRM CONSTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT [BUILD (CA) QRS 12-24, INC., SHALL RECOVER FROM THE SCOTT COMPANIES AND SCOTT CO OF CALIFORNIA THE SUM OF $31,479,165.35. CONSTRUCT (CA) QRS 14-18, INC. SHALL RECOVER $8,236,126.60]
